home.bootcampDescription: Our AI Bootcamp is designed to empower the next generation of AI leaders. Learn in-demand skills, network with industry professionals, and unlock new career opportunities.
home.professionalTools: 27+ professional-grade tools you'll have access to throughout the bootcamp
home.turnLearning: Turn your learning into income immediately
home.seePower: See the power of AI in action
home.structuredTimeline: A structured timeline for a focused two-day intensive bootcamp.
home.joinHundreds: Join hundreds of students who are already learning AI at Buddha Institute
home.applyAiSkills: Apply AI skills in everyday scenarios
home.handsOnProjects: Hands-on projects designed for learners building a strong foundational portfolio with real-world applications.
home.trustedProgram: A trusted program built for Class 10th, 12th pass and graduate students to gain practical AI skills quickly with real-world applications and career opportunities.
home.track1Long: Master the end-to-end process of storytelling with AI. Create talking avatars using HeyGen, master video editing, and use Veo3 for advanced visual generation to produce complete short films.
home.track2Long: Build and deploy full-stack web applications from scratch. Master frameworks like Next.js and React, integrate AI APIs, and use Cursor AI and AntiGravity to launch live SaaS products.
home.track3Long: Dominate digital marketing with social media automation. Generate high-converting ad copy, design graphics with Nano Banana Pro, and manage campaigns using Meta AI, Soshie, and Seomi.
home.track4Long: Master prompt engineering (Chain-of-thought) and design intelligent automation systems. Create custom GPT/Claude applications and build end-to-end business workflows using N8N and Python.
home.track1Tools: HeyGen, Synthesia, Runway ML, Veo3, Filmora 15
home.track3Tools: Meta AI, Canva, Nano Banana Pro, GenSpark, Soshie, Seomi
home.track4Tools: N8N, OpenAI API, Python, ChatGPT, Claude
home.descWriting: Create compelling content with AI assistance
home.descAudio: Create voice and music with AI
home.descSearch: Find information and answers with AI
home.descProductivity: Design and create with AI tools

success.onlineDescription: Learn from the comfort of your home with live interactive sessions, all course materials, certificate of completion, and one year community support. Perfect for those who prefer learning remotely.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our bootcamp
faq.q1: What is the AI Udaan Bootcamp?
faq.a1: The AI Udaan Bootcamp is a 2-day intensive program designed to teach you in-demand AI skills. You'll learn ChatGPT, Midjourney, automation, content creation, and digital marketing with AI tools.
faq.a2: Anyone interested in learning AI is welcome! Whether you're a student, professional, or entrepreneur, our bootcamp is designed for all skill levels. No prior AI experience is required.
faq.q3: What will I learn in this bootcamp?
faq.a3: You'll master ChatGPT & prompting, AI content filmmaking, AI digital marketing, automation workflows, and how to earn money using AI tools. The bootcamp includes 27+ AI tools training.
faq.q4: Do I get a certificate after completing the bootcamp?
faq.a4: Yes! You'll receive a certificate of completion from Buddha Institute of Technology upon successfully finishing the bootcamp and all projects.
faq.q5: What's the bootcamp fee and are there discounts?
faq.a5: We offer two plans: Udaan Lite (₹999) without accommodation and Udaan Plus (₹2,499) with accommodation. Early bird discounts are available. Limited seats are open so register now!
faq.notFound: Didn't find what you're looking for?

journey.title: The Journey of AI Udaan
journey.subtitle: Our Story & Vision
journey.description: From a humble beginning to Bihar's leading AI training platform. Discover how we're empowering the next generation with practical skills.
journey.sparkDesc: AI Udaan began as a small initiative to teach local students about the potential of ChatGPT and AI automation in Bihar.
journey.growthDesc: We successfully trained over 500+ students across various districts, helping them secure high-paying AI-assisted gigs.
journey.partnershipDesc: Collaborated with Buddha Institute of Technology to bring a formal curriculum to the AI revolution.
journey.impactDesc: Launching Bihar's first comprehensive 2-day AI Bootcamp to prepare 5000+ students for the 2026 economic landscape.
